mapper.insert: insert into player (id, plat, serverId, createServerId, createTime, userId, roleName, fightPower, `level`, career, playerVip, `data`) value ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{plat,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serverId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createServerId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fightPower,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{career,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{playerVip,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{data,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} ) on duplicate key update `serverId` = #{serverId}, `roleName` = #{roleName}, `fightPower` = #{fightPower}, `level` = #{level}, `playerVip` = #{playerVip}, `data` = #{data}
